ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "total_copies" INTEGER /* Total number of copies of the book in the library */,
  "available_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies currently available for borrowing */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Cover type of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Shelf location within the library */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Physical condition of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the author */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publisher is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patron, librarian, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the library */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "borrow_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of books the user can borrow at a time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the branch */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the branch */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the branch is active */,
  "manager_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_manager_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowing_history" (
  "borrow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being borrowed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user borrowing the book */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the book was borrowed */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due for return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book was returned (if applicable) */,
  "borrow_status" TEXT /* Status of the borrowing (e.g., borrowed, returned, overdue) */,
  "renewed_times" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been renewed */,
  "initial_due_date" TEXT /* Initial due date before any renewals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_history_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overdue_books" (
  "overdue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overdue book */,
  "borrow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrowing event */,
  "days_overdue" INTEGER /* Number of days the book is overdue */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee charged for the overdue book */,
  "fine_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fine has been paid */,
  "paid_date" TEXT /* Date the fine was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overdue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overdue_books_borrow_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrow_id") REFERENCES borrowing_history ("borrow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reserved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the reservation was made */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., active, expired, fulfilled) */,
  "reserved_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the book is reserved (for inter-branch reservations) */,
  "is_notified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has been notified about the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_reserved_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("reserved_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)
